snippet.title: Har Baar (Official Lyric Visualiser) - Murtaza Qizilbash | Samar Jafri
snippet.description:
Har Baar is the outcry of two yearning minds, intertwined in a fight between complaining and making amends. The heart wants what the heart wants and will think to the brink of exhaustion, hoping to get a glimpse of the love it chases. To all the yearners, this song is for you.

- MQ and SJ


Credits:

Written and performed by Murtaza Qizilbash and Samar Jafri
Composition by Murtaza Qizilbash and Samar Jafri

snippet.title: [URDU] 2026 PMGO Season 1 South Asia Finals | Day 1
snippet.description:
Welcome to the official broadcast of the 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN SEASON 1 SOUTH ASIA FINALS - Day 1 🔥

Ultimate showdown ab shuru hota hai! Pakistan, Nepal, aur Bangladesh ki top 16 teams qualifiers ka tough safar tay kar ke ab championship title aur 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event ki 3 coveted slots ke liye ready hain.

Taiyar ho jao intense action, clutch moments, aur top-tier competitive PUBG MOBILE ke liye, jahan South Asia ki best teams sab se bari stage par aamne saamne hongi.

Esports history bante huay dekho - aur stream ko subscribe karna, notifications on karna, aur Finals ka pura maza lena mat bhoolna!

💰 Prize Pool: $40,000

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.
